What we do

Every service your yard needs, done right.

From a standing weekly mow to a full landscape redesign, Arthur and the crew handle it all — with the kind of attention to detail you can only get from folks who genuinely love the work.

Lawn Mowing & Trimming

Crisp, even cuts and clean-trimmed edges on a schedule you can set your watch by. A fresh, tidy lawn every single week.

Mulching

Fresh mulch that locks in moisture, keeps weeds down, and makes your beds look rich, tidy, and finished.

Sod Installation

An instant, lush green lawn laid tight and true — then checked on until every seam roots in perfectly.

Spring & Fall Clean-ups

Seasonal resets that clear the leaves, debris, and winter mess so your yard starts every season fresh and ready.

Gutter Clean-outs

Clogged gutters cleared and flushed so water flows where it should — protecting your roof, siding, and foundation.

Tree Service

Trimming, pruning, and clean removals that keep your trees healthy, safe, and shaped the way you want them.

Landscape Design

A thoughtful plan for beds, plantings, and flow — designed around your home, your taste, and how you actually live outside.

Hardscaping

Patios, walkways, and retaining walls built to last — the solid foundation your whole outdoor space is built on.

Why folks call Bluegrass

Big-time results from a crew that treats your yard like their own.

There's no call center here and no runaround — just Arthur, a hard-working crew, and a genuine pride in leaving every property better than we found it.

— Arthur, owner

Local & personal

Owned and run by Arthur right here in Peru — you deal directly with the person doing the work.

Always a free estimate

Honest, no-pressure quotes. You'll know exactly what to expect before we ever start.

Reliable & on-time

We show up when we say we will and finish when we promise — even in 90-degree heat.

Real attention to detail

Clean lines, tidy edges, and the little finishing touches that make a yard look truly cared for.

Residential & commercial

From a single front lawn to a full commercial property, we're equipped to keep it all looking sharp.

Straight from the neighbors

Five-star reviews, earned one yard at a time.
